name: Satisfactory
longDescription:
Satisfactory is a first-person open-world factory building game from Coffee Stain Studios. This ServApp deploys a dedicated multiplayer server using the community wolveix/satisfactory-server image.

Configure game port, API port, max players, Steam beta branch, and save path at install time. Expect high memory use; 8GB+ RAM is recommended for a stable dedicated world.
description: Dedicated Satisfactory multiplayer factory server with installer options for ports, players, and persistent saves.
